title: In vivo fluorescence imaging of conjunctival goblet cells.
author: Kim S Lee S Chang H Kim M Kim MJ Kim KH
content: S-EPMC6820527 PMC6820527 In vivo fluorescence imaging of conjunctival goblet cells. Conjunctival goblet cells (GCs) are specialized epithelial cells that secrete mucins onto the ocular surface to maintain the wet environment. Assessment of GCs is important because various ocular surface diseases
